data.description:
## What
`rebar list` (and the MCP `list_tickets` tool) currently return full ticket dicts including `description` and `comments`, producing very large output (148KB for `list --type=epic`). Make these agent-facing list surfaces lean by default.

## Scope
- `list_states(..., include_body: bool = True)` in `src/rebar/_engine_support/reads.py`: when False, strip `description` and `comments` from each public_state dict. Default True keeps internal callers (`validate`, `next_batch`, `list-epics`) unchanged.
- CLI `_cmd_list` in `src/rebar/_engine_support/reads_cli.py`: lean by default; add `--full` flag to include bodies. Update usage/help text.
- MCP `list_tickets` in `src/rebar/mcp_server.py`: add `full: bool = False`; pass through.
- Library `rebar.list_tickets` / `_reads.list_tickets`: thread a `full` param (default True — preserves programmatic LLM callers that need bodies).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `rebar list` JSON output omits `description` and `comments` by default
- [ ] `rebar list --full` includes `description` and `comments`
- [ ] `--output llm` path also respects lean default
- [ ] Internal callers (validate/next_batch/list-epics) still receive bodies (unchanged)
- [ ] MCP `list_tickets` lean by default, `full=True` opt-in; output still validates against TicketStateOut
- [ ] Test suite passes (existing list tests updated as needed)
data.title: rebar list: omit description/comments by default (lean list output; --full opt-in)
